### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Events](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Events.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Events')

## EventMetadata Class

Contains the 15 typed metadata fields for an event \(FR11\)\. Enables structured access to metadata
without touching the payload \(efficient for logging, indexing, routing\)\.

```csharp
public record EventMetadata : System.IEquatable<Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Events.EventMetadata>
```
